title: Grade 7 ICT — Units 5-6
description: 30 challenging questions covering computer security, safety, and LOGO programming.

questions.question: Before cleaning any electrical equipment, what must you ensure according to the textbook?
options: It is switched off and unplugged from the power source
The equipment is running to heat up dust
Only the monitor is turned off
questions.correctAnswer: It is switched off and unplugged from the power source

questions.question: How long should monitors and laser printers be allowed to cool down before cleaning?
Which computer components should only be maintained by specially trained people because they use high voltages?
According to the textbook, what does dust act as inside a computer?
options: An insulator that prevents air circulation
questions.correctAnswer: An insulator that prevents air circulation

questions.question: What problem can dust containing conductive particles cause inside a computer?
options: It can cause a short circuit and possibly a fire
questions.correctAnswer: It can cause a short circuit and possibly a fire

questions.question: What is compressed air used for when cleaning a computer?
What is the safest method to clean a computer monitor according to the textbook?
options: Wiping with a dry paper towel
Using a vacuum cleaner with a brush attachment
Using a soft and clean cloth moistened with water
Spraying glass cleaner directly on the screen
questions.correctAnswer: Using a soft and clean cloth moistened with water

questions.question: Why should liquids not be sprayed directly onto a computer screen?
options: The liquid could make the screen permanently slippery
The liquid could leak into the monitor and damage internal components
The liquid could cause the screen to change color
The liquid could cause a fire
questions.correctAnswer: The liquid could leak into the monitor and damage internal components

questions.question: What is recommended for cleaning sticky dirt from a computer keyboard?
How many types of user accounts does the Windows operating system offer according to the textbook?
What does the acronym LOGO stand for?
LOGO's graphics language is called what?
According to the glossary, LOGO is classified as what type of programming language?
What type of programming language is LOGO described as in the textbook?
What was LOGO originally designed for?
options: To introduce children to programming concepts
To replace BASIC as a business language
questions.correctAnswer: To introduce children to programming concepts

questions.question: What are the two main parts of the MSW Logo screen according to Section 6.2?
options: Command input box and Output box

questions.question: What shape is the turtle at the center of the MSW Logo graphic screen?
Which screen element of MSW Logo contains the name of the program?
What is the function of the Button bar in MSW Logo?
options: It displays error messages and output results
It provides additional shortcuts for LOGO commands
It shows the current position of the turtle
It contains the name of the program
questions.correctAnswer: It provides additional shortcuts for LOGO commands

questions.question: What does the CS command do in MSW Logo?
options: Saves the current drawing to a file
Erases all drawings and sets the turtle at the center
questions.correctAnswer: Erases all drawings and sets the turtle at the center

questions.question: How many basic drawing commands does MSW Logo consist of?
What type of argument does the FD (forward) command require?
What type of argument does the RT (right) command require?
What shape does the command REPEAT 4 [FORWARD 100 RIGHT 90] draw?
What is a procedure in LOGO programming?
options: A built-in command that cannot be changed
A set of instructions given a name
A special type of error message
A file format for saving drawings
questions.correctAnswer: A set of instructions given a name

questions.question: Which command is used to begin defining a new procedure in LOGO?
What must be typed to mark the end of a procedure in the To Mode Input box?
What message appears if you try to run a procedure before defining it in LOGO?
options: Your procedure is not in LOGO's vocabulary yet
questions.correctAnswer: Your procedure is not in LOGO's vocabulary yet

questions.question: What is the file extension for files saved in LOGO?
What are primitive procedures in LOGO?
options: Procedures defined by the user for specific tasks
Basic commands that LOGO already knows
The longest and most complex procedures
questions.correctAnswer: Basic commands that LOGO already knows
